name: com.cidonix.unibridge
description: Local MCP tools that let AI coding agents inspect, edit, capture, and validate Unity Editor projects through a per-project bridge and relay.

_upm.changelog:
### Fixed

- ScriptApplyEdits now implements anchor_insert, anchor_delete, and anchor_replace consistently in text and mixed edit routes.
- Mixed Preview calls are strictly no-write and return the planned text diff plus structured edit plan.
- SHA preconditions now apply to structured, text, and mixed edits.
- Missing and ambiguous anchors return actionable validation errors unless the caller explicitly chooses no-op or disambiguation behavior.
- MCP smoke regression previews and applies every anchor operation and verifies cleanup, C# validation, SHA guards, and failure diagnostics.

### Previous Changes

- ManageUI SetGraphic applies and verifies TextMeshProUGUI text and font settings in Prefab Stage while preserving Unicode.
- ManageUI creation actions resolve explicit parents inside the current Prefab Stage and create objects in the stage scene.
- RuntimeStateProbe Assertions has the correct array-of-objects MCP schema with tolerant single-object normalization.
- WorkSession semantic review detects stale/noisy scene baselines and returns a compact skipped status.
